title: Containment
description: Disaster strikes! A novice mage's experiment has gone catastrophically wrong in the Athenaeum basement, creating a spreading magical anomaly that threatens to destabilize reality itself. You must contain the anomaly before it spreads beyond the Athenaeum and wreaks havoc across Dalhurst. Time is of the essence!

objectives.description: Assess the magical anomaly in the basement

objectives.notes: Requires channeling magic to dispel corruption

objectives.description: Defeat the magical anomalies spawned by the corruption
objectives.notes: Hostile magical entities attacking the Athenaeum
Use containment ritual to close the tear

objectives.description: Report successful containment to Archmage Elara

notes: Second Journeyman quest. Timed/urgent quest. Combat against magical enemies. Rewards powerful staff.
